name: crawfish
description: Knowledge and command ergonomics for authoring & operating a Crawfish project: the security spine (the prompt-injection boundary), the pipeline mental model, determinism discipline, and reading the ledger. The skills teach; the enforcement lives in the craw code verbs (assembly gate, consent re-gate, secret-shaped lint) and the jailed compile.
